raw_consumer_statement:
The merchant offers FREE RETURNS with no postage or shipping fees. See attached proof of this from the website when I purchased the item. The package came with defective and missing components. I then was authorized to make a FREE RETURN and never received my refund. 
The merchant did agree to accept return of the missing/defective item and sent me a UPS return label, ( attached ). I then returned the item to the merchant using their label. I hereby reaffirm the merchant received the defective products as UPS confirmed this through tracking and proof of delivery, ( attached ).

Merchant never issued a refund. I disputed the {$61.00} in stolen monies with Citi MasterCard and was given a temporary credit which they now reversed when the merchant responded to Citi Mastercard dispute by now claiming I owed {$61.00} in postage views. Citi never allowed me to challenge this dispute lie, or appeal the dispute, they simply closed the dispute and said tough luck you owe postage which is the merchant now says was the same price as the returned item quite conveniently. I looked at XXXX response and it says nothing about postage charges, it was all gibberish. I have extensive documentation that the return was FREE, the item was returned, and I was owed my monies and the merchant and Citi are in collusion to steal my money.
